arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Juventus vs Udinese – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Allianz Stadium forms the backdrop for a must-win Serie A clash between Champions League hopefuls Juventus and mid-table Udinese. As expected, one of the most intense top-four battles in recent memory has gone down to the wire. The post Serie A Preview: Juventus vs Udinese – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

Juventus remain in fourth place despite conceding a late equaliser to Lazio on Saturday, after also been left to play with 10 men for almost the entire second half. The Bianconeri, who are level on p...
